data.body: Recurred 2026-07-03 on Gerrit change 174 (sync.remote), CI run https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/28632056833 — CI (macos-latest, py3.12), default suite: test_graph_build_1000_tickets_under_2s took 2.084s for a 1,000-ticket chain (limit 2.0s). ~4% over on a loaded macOS runner; unrelated to the change. Cast Verified-1; cleared with 'recheck'. More evidence the absolute 2.0s wall-clock limit is too tight for GitHub-hosted macOS runners.
